missingSurface: A canonical frontend EffectiveAccessPreviewProjection read model dedicated to /ops/access/role-scope-studio.
expectedOwnerTask: Phase 0 identity/access authority plus Phase 9 governance frontend integration.
temporaryFallback: The task 458 adapter materializes a preview-only GovernanceRoleScopeStudioProjection from the canonical ActingScopeTuple, GovernanceScopeToken, visibility envelope, minimum-necessary, release-freeze, and settlement refs. It never treats route labels, side navigation, or local UI state as authorization.
riskIfUnresolved: Future live integration could drift if an access-preview service adds fields or predicates that are not projected into the studio; operators would see a conservative denial instead of a live approval.
followUpAction: Promote EffectiveAccessPreviewProjection to a canonical query contract owned by the identity/access service, including persona, object type, route family, artifact mask, denied predicate, release-freeze, telemetry-fence, and settlement refs.
whyFallbackPreservesAlgorithm: The fallback is fail-closed: mutation controls are disabled, export controls require OutboundNavigationGrant, hidden fields are not rendered, masked fields are synthetic, stale or frozen state downgrades to diagnostic/recovery/blocked posture, and every visible decision cites canonical source objects.
